ham.subject: Scheduled VPN Maintenance – Please Read
ham.body:
Hello Team,

Please be advised that we will be conducting scheduled maintenance on the Corporate VPN infrastructure from 02:00 AM to 04:00 AM UTC on Friday, March 15th. During this window, VPN access will be temporarily unavailable.

What to expect:
- All VPN endpoints will be rebooted.
- No authentication will be possible during the maintenance.
- The service will be fully restored by 04:00 AM UTC.

If you have critical work that requires VPN connectivity, please plan accordingly or contact IT support.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best,
IT Operations Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Microsoft 365 Password Expiry – Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Valued User,

Microsoft 365 Security Alert

Your Microsoft 365 account has been flagged for potential security risk. Your password is set to expire in 3 days. To avoid temporary lockout, please reset your password immediately by following the secure verification process.

Click here to verify your account: <URL>

If you do not update your password within the allotted time, your account will be disabled.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Best regards,
Microsoft 365 Security Team
